name: word_literal_needs_boundary_dollar
description: With `$` in %word, the word-literal '${' requires a word boundary, so '${x}' does not interpolate.
grammar:
Doc <- Span*
Span <- '${' Ident '}'
      / Ch+
Ch <- !('${') .
Ident <- [a-z]+
%word <- [a-zA-Z0-9_$]

cases.expected_ast:
+ Doc
  + Span/1
    - Ch ($)
    - Ch ({)
    - Ch (x)
    - Ch (})

+ Doc
  + Span/1
    - Ch (a)
    - Ch ($)
    - Ch ({)
    - Ch (x)
    - Ch (})
    - Ch (b)

name: keyword_literal_boundary
description: A word-literal keyword only matches at a word boundary.
